title: bye bill
body:
this too will pass
live loose and laugh
give to who you have
remember the limits don't fit in the math
assemble the bits like puzzles
when you're finished it's your business to give em back
cuz someone else is coming
and they don't wanna
from i will to bye bill
i feel my fire find enough fuel
to fill the room with a light light like i like for late night reading
after i'm done actin and eatin all day
i lay here parsing my bill
the moon is my medium
we wax poetic until the waning tide tunes me in
the sky is a fine blanket
and i'm cool to take shelter when i find it
i've killed darlings for silence in the violence when i mind it
otherwise the noise is a shrine in the wild
and i fill the void behind me
with stories that give me gifts
when a present reminds me
that grace only finds me when i need it
i'm saying what i'm seeing is that being is timely
but that's not the way it presents inside me
my life ain't inciting or incidental
it's exciting and existential
i'm riding the line like a pencil that can't see the stencil
but tends to, ink lined too, mental
color theory instrumental
syllables assailable so i let it rip when the wind's available
change'll stamp me. yeah i'm malleable
can't always mind lines though, sometimes i'um foul a ball
more often than not i get caught looking thinking i should be swinging
when i could be swinging while i'm looking and not giving up anything put in front of me
post id
i won't stay home with my ego or my super
ghostin when i'm done hostin cuz my life ain't a twofer
and i know it
poet
cuz i got a cup and something's flowing through here
from my lips to new ears
my drip is too clear
tongue tip a frontier
what a trip to see you here

https://soundcloud.com/loficoffee/tudo-bem-feat-lofi-trumpet
https://soundcloud.com/scar-prod/veintiuno
